title: Blackspur BB-RLP102 Heavy Duty Revolving Leather Punch
features: Comfort grip handles with self opening, easy to use spring tension
Revolving turret with 6 different hole sizes making it great for setting eyelets in all types of thin material
description: Product Description Blackspur Heavy Duty leather punch has a revolving turret with 6 different hole sizes making it great for setting eyelets in all types of thin material. It has comfort gr IP handles with self opening, easy to use spring tension. Packed in double blister. It has approximate item Weight 256 grams. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Punch
